caption: A man with light-colored, styled hair and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white collared shirt, a red bow tie, and gold-colored suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and faces toward a black microphone on a stand. Behind him, a wall features a framed picture of a man's face and another framed image of a yellow and black shield logo. To the left, a woman in a green dress and pink headwrap is partially visible, standing in the background. On-screen text and logos appear throughout the scene, including a circular logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and red text that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in a steady profile position, looking ahead, with very little movement in his posture or the surrounding environment.
